summary: Iteration 94: Full E2E POS/Bar Ordering System Testing Complete. All 15 backend tests passed (100%). Complete flow validated: Login → Open tab → Add items with modifiers → Close tab → Record tip → Verify persistence.

auth_endpoints.POST /api/auth/login: PASS - Returns access_token, refresh_token, user object with role CEO

tap_endpoints.GET /api/tap/sessions: PASS - Returns sessions list with open sessions
tap_endpoints.GET /api/tap/catalog: PASS - Returns 28+ items with categories (Beers, Cocktails, Spirits, Non-alcoholic, Snacks, Starters, Mains)
tap_endpoints.POST /api/tap/session/open: PASS - Creates new session with FormData (venue_id, guest_name, session_type)
tap_endpoints.POST /api/tap/session/{id}/add: PASS - Adds item with modifiers JSON in FormData
tap_endpoints.GET /api/tap/session/{id}: PASS - Returns session with items, guest_name, total, tip fields
tap_endpoints.POST /api/tap/session/{id}/close: PASS - Closes session with FormData (payment_method, payment_location)

pulse_endpoints.GET /api/pulse/inside: PASS - Returns guests currently inside venue
pulse_endpoints.GET /api/pulse/entries/today: PASS - Returns today's entries with total/allowed/denied counts
pulse_endpoints.POST /api/pulse/guest/intake: PASS - Creates guest with photo field in FormData

e2e_flow.full_flow: PASS - Complete flow: login → open tab → get catalog → add item with modifiers → verify session → close tab → record tip → verify tip persistence

critical_code_review_comments: All POST endpoints in /tap/ correctly use FormData (not JSON) as documented
Response middleware wraps all responses in {success: true, data: ..., error: null} format
Tip recording correctly persists tip_amount, tip_percent, tip_recorded in session meta
Session detail endpoint returns all required fields including tip fields
seed_data_creation: No seed data created. Used existing demo data.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All backend APIs for POS/bar ordering system are working correctly. FormData is required for all POST mutations in /tap/ routes. Auth endpoints use JSON body. Full E2E flow (login → open tab → add items → close → record tip → verify) is validated.
